## Constitution Compliance

- [ ] CHK001 Tests written first (TDD Red-Green-Refactor cycle followed)
- [ ] CHK002 Minimum 80% test coverage achieved (JaCoCo report)
- [ ] CHK003 Layered architecture respected (domain/persistence/services/commands)
- [ ] CHK004 All configuration externalizable (env/.env/conf)
- [ ] CHK005 Error handling uses `Result<T, DomainError>` pattern
- [ ] CHK006 Structured logging included for new operations
- [ ] CHK007 Dagger 2 dependency injection used for new components

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK008 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK009 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK010 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK011 Another category item
- [ ] CHK012 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK013 Final item in this category

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
